title: callitris subumbellata
intro: Callitris subumbellata, also known as the Western White Cypress Pine, is a species of coniferous tree native to southwestern Australia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callitris subumbellata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Callitris subumbellata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
